pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin with Java 11 source/target and annotation processors.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 and updated dependencies.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to require Java 8-15 and Maven 3.6+.
Update Jib plugin to use AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Grunt frontend builder configuration as it is no longer supported in newer JHipster versions.
Remove the explicit Java 8 version setting as the project is migrating to Java 11.

package.json.general_idea: Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI ecosystem.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, requirejs; Added @angular/core, @angular/cli, webpack

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing setup with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; Added jest, protractor, @angular-builders/jest

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Change Hibernate dialect package path to match JHipster's custom dialect location.
Remove deprecated Hibernate naming strategy property which is no longer supported in newer Hibernate versions.
Migrate cache configuration from legacy Spring Boot 1.x format to JHipster-specific properties.
Update logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot 2.x level format.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool for better performance and JDK 11 compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.type to com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource and removed com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove deprecated EJB3NamingStrategy which is incompatible with newer Hibernate versions used in JDK 11 migrations.
Migrate from legacy metrics libraries (Spark/Graphite) to Spring Boot Actuator metrics for JDK 11 compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed metrics.spark and metrics.graphite blocks, added management.metrics.export.prometheus.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate custom JHipster properties to the new jhipster.* namespace structure introduced in JHipster 6.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Moved http.cache, cache, security, mail, and logging configs under jhipster: prefix.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management namespace structure.
Update async thread pool configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x task execution namespace.
Move mail configuration into the standard Spring Boot mail namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: mail: host: localhost -> spring.mail.host: localhost (implied by structure change)

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Introduce explicit JPA and Hibernate configuration properties required for Spring Boot 2.x compatibility.
